_comment: OFFICIAL marketplace index. This is the file case-service actually polls: marketplace_index_url points here, _ensure_sources_seeded registers it as the 'Velaris Official' source, and _poll_source() reads the packages[] array below into the marketplace_packages cache. Each entry must stay in sync with that app's official/<app>/velaris.json. Tier is never trusted from this file — _effective_tier re-derives it (source org velaris-app-os + under official/ + id in official_registry.json).

packages.name: HxTest
packages.description: AI test layer for Velaris: scenario generation (HxNexus), live regeneration, rationale, the Studio HxTest page, and app-bundled test registration. Built on the inbuilt Test Suite. Installing it turns on /api/v1/hxtest and the Studio HxTest module for the tenant.

versions.release_notes: Initial release. Marketplace AI layer on top of the inbuilt Test Suite.

packages.name: HxCheckout
packages.description: Commerce integration layer: connect any existing website to Velaris. External baskets become Order cases that Velaris owns end-to-end (payment, fulfilment, delivery tracking, returns, complaints). Server-to-server API + HMAC webhook mode (Shopify/WooCommerce/Magento/BigCommerce). Installing it turns on /api/v1/checkout and the Studio HxCheckout module for the tenant.

versions.release_notes: Initial release. Order intake API + HMAC webhook mode + Order case type + returns/complaints.

packages.name: HxStorefront
packages.description: Hosted store builder for Velaris clients with no existing website. Branded catalogue, theme + page builder, categories, inventory, promotions, SEO, and a public storefront at /store/:slug. Every purchase flows through HxCheckout to become an Order case. Installing it turns on /api/v1/storefront (+ the public storefront API) and the Studio HxStorefront module for the tenant.

versions.release_notes: Initial release. Store + catalogue + theme/page builder + inventory + promotions + media + public storefront + HxCheckout order bridge.
